name: Sate Babi (Pork Sate)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp melted pork fat or butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the minced pork with the melted pork fat.
2. Mix in the crushed garlic, dark soya sauce, and lemon juice until well blended.
3. Form small patties from the mixture.
4. Grill the patties over medium heat until cooked through.
5. Turn off the heat and serve hot.
